channel.title: Google-Fonts on Joe Muller's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Google-Fonts on Joe Muller's Blog

item.title: Using Google Fonts with Tailwind
item.description:
Contents

I’ve been working on a handful of web apps made stylish by TailwindCSS but was a bit disappointed that I couldn’t easily figure out how to use a Google Font in place of the default font. This tutorial fixes that.

Find your Font

Go to Google Fonts and search for the font that fits your project. Once you’ve found it, click the “Get Font” button at the upper right of the screen:
